title: 🎙️ Indigenous Lands & Innovation
description: Tŝilhqot'in, Secwépemc, Dakelh — language, governance, land stewardship, and tech - Daily themed article selection for podcast generation

_podcast.theme_description: Tŝilhqot'in, Secwépemc, Dakelh — language, governance, land stewardship, and tech
_podcast.theme_scoring_prompt: Rate how well this article fits the theme 'Indigenous Lands & Innovation' through a RURAL TECH AND INNOVATION lens. Strong fits include: language revitalization technology for Tŝilhqot'in/Secwépemc/Dakelh, Indigenous guardian programs using remote monitoring and sensors, land management tech and environmental monitoring on Indigenous lands, digital tools for traditional knowledge preservation, community mapping and GIS for land claims, Indigenous-led connectivity projects, technology for cultural heritage documentation, mobile apps for language learning, drone/satellite monitoring for stewardship, reconciliation through digital collaboration, and how Cariboo Indigenous nations use innovation for self-determination. Prefer articles that bridge Indigenous governance/culture AND technology. Score 0-100 where 100 is a perfect thematic match and 0 is completely unrelated.

items.title: [New Atlas] The R66 Turbinetruck: The little cargo copter without a cockpit
items.content_html:
Sikorsky subsidiary Robinson’s R66 Turbinetruck looks like many other light cargo helicopters, yet something about it seems a little off. But what? Oh, right – instead of a cockpit, the aircraft has a pair of clamshell doors and no place for a crew.

items.title: [New Atlas] Lamprey-inspired suction cup lifts 850 times its own weight
items.content_html:
Lampreys are able to stay securely attached to whales and sharks as they hurtle through the ocean, so you'd think they could teach us a thing or two about suction. It turns out that they can indeed, as scientists have developed a lamprey-inspired suction cup that can lift over 800 times its own weight.

Continue Reading

Category: Technology

Tags: Biomimicry, Peking University
